first_exit_object_label: {crossing_motion_rule_text} Which labeled moving object leaves the board first?
Use the arrows on the moving objects. Which labeled moving object exits the grid first? {crossing_motion_rule_text}
{crossing_motion_rule_text} Identify the labeled moving object that reaches an outer edge before the other labeled objects.
{crossing_motion_rule_text} Which labeled moving object will leave the lane grid first?
Which labeled moving object exits the board earliest? {crossing_motion_rule_text}
hit_object_label: {crossing_motion_rule_text} Which labeled moving object hits the numbered yellow route?
Use the numbered yellow route cells and the arrows on the moving objects. Which labeled moving object collides with the route? {crossing_motion_rule_text}
{crossing_motion_rule_text} Identify the labeled moving object that reaches the same lane cell as the yellow route at the matching tick.
For the marked yellow route, which labeled moving object lands on the route at the same tick?
Which labeled moving object will hit the numbered yellow route? {crossing_motion_rule_text}
left_moving_object_count: How many moving objects have arrows pointing left?
Count the moving objects whose arrows point left.
What is the number of moving objects moving left?
Determine how many moving objects show a left-pointing arrow.
Report the count of left-moving objects.
right_moving_object_count: How many moving objects have arrows pointing right?
Count the moving objects whose arrows point right.
What is the number of moving objects moving right?
Determine how many moving objects show a right-pointing arrow.
Report the count of right-moving objects.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_traffic_crossing: a lane-crossing game board with moving objects, direction arrows, start pads, and one marked route line
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_traffic_crossing_no_r: a lane-crossing game board with moving objects and direction arrows
code_prompt_defaults.crossing_motion_rule_text: At tick 1, the runner enters the bottom traffic row; at each next tick, the runner moves one row upward. Each moving object shifts one lane cell per tick in its arrow direction. Objects that reach an edge leave the board.
code_prompt_defaults.crossing_exit_motion_rule_text: At each tick, every moving object shifts one lane cell in its arrow direction. A moving object exits when it moves past the left or right edge.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_first_exit_object_label: set "annotation" to one point [x, y] at the center of the labeled moving object that leaves the board first
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_hit_object_label: set "annotation" to one point [x, y] at the center of the labeled moving object that hits the marked route
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_left_moving_object_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space object boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one for every moving object whose arrow points left
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_right_moving_object_coun: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space object boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one for every moving object whose arrow points right
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_first_exit_object_label: set "answer" to the visible label of the moving object that leaves the board first; the value is one of A, B, C, or D
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_hit_object_label: set "answer" to the visible label of the moving object that hits the marked route; the value is one of A, B, C, or D
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_left_moving_object_count: set "answer" to the number of moving objects whose arrow points left; the value is between 1 and 6
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_right_moving_object_count: set "answer" to the number of moving objects whose arrow points right; the value is between 1 and 6
